# Vendored LLVM Base

- Source: `https://github.com/julesjacobs/llvm-project.git`
- Branch: `jujacobs/oxcaml-llvm-integration`
- Commit: `1fc49b70ffad57d8706036336ca0d6d94ac2353e`

This records the upstream LLVM snapshot imported into
`vendor/llvm-project`. Agent changes to vendored LLVM should be reviewed in
the same OxCaml PR as the OxCaml changes that require them.
